sentences.target: Diese Sorge raubt mir den Schlaf.

translations.de: Diese Sorge raubt mir den Schlaf.
translations.en: This worry keeps me from sleeping.
translations.es: Esta preocupación no me deja dormir.
translations.it: Questa preoccupazione non mi fa dormire.
translations.ko: 이 걱정 때문에 잠이 오지 않아요.
translations.ru: Из-за этой тревоги я не могу спать.
translations.pt: Essa preocupação não me deixa dormir.
translations.he: הדאגה הזאת לא נותנת לי לישון.
translations.vi: Nỗi lo này khiến tôi không ngủ được.
translations.uk: Через цю тривогу я не можу заснути.
translations.hu: Ez az aggodalom nem hagy aludni.
translations.hi: यह चिंता मुझे सोने नहीं देती.
translations.pl: Ten niepokój nie daje mi spać.
translations.el: Αυτή η ανησυχία δεν με αφήνει να κοιμηθώ.
translations.id: Kekhawatiran ini membuat saya tidak bisa tidur.
translations.sv: Den här oron gör att jag inte kan sova.
translations.ro: Această grijă nu mă lasă să dorm.
translations.da: Den her bekymring holder mig vågen.
translations.ja: この心配のせいで眠れない。

tokens.explanation: Demonstrative determiner (NOM.SG.FEM) modifying 'Sorge'; marks the subject NP.
Noun (FEM.SG.NOM); head of the subject NP.
Finite main verb (3SG.PRS); takes 'mir' (DAT) as indirect object/experiencer and 'den Schlaf' (ACC) as direct object.
Personal pronoun (1SG.DAT); indirect object/experiencer.
Definite article (ACC.SG.MASC) for 'Schlaf'.
Noun (MASC.SG.ACC); direct object, the thing being deprived.

sentences.target: Mit Sorge beobachte ich das Wetter.

translations.de: Mit Sorge beobachte ich das Wetter.
translations.en: I watch the weather with concern.
translations.fr: Je regarde la météo avec inquiétude.
translations.ru: Я с тревогой слежу за погодой.
translations.he: אני עוקב אחרי מזג האוויר בדאגה.
translations.vi: Tôi lo lắng theo dõi thời tiết.
translations.nl: Ik kijk bezorgd naar het weer.
translations.uk: Я стежу за погодою з тривогою.
translations.hi: मैं चिंता के साथ मौसम पर नज़र रखता हूँ.
translations.nb: Jeg følger bekymret med på været.
translations.id: Saya memantau cuaca dengan rasa cemas.
translations.ja: 心配しながら天気を見ています。

tokens.explanation: Preposition governing Dative; introduces a PP of manner/attitude.
Noun (FEM.SG.DAT); object of preposition 'mit'.
Finite main verb (1SG.PRS); selects subject 'ich' and direct object 'das Wetter'.
Personal pronoun (1SG.NOM); subject.
Definite article (ACC.SG.NEUT) for 'Wetter'; marks the direct object.
Noun (NEUT.SG.ACC); direct object of 'beobachte'.

sentences.target: Er hat Sorge um seinen Job.

translations.de: Er hat Sorge um seinen Job.
translations.en: He is worried about his job.
translations.it: È preoccupato per il suo lavoro.
translations.pt: Ele está preocupado com o emprego dele.
translations.vi: Anh ấy lo lắng về công việc của mình.
translations.nl: Hij maakt zich zorgen over zijn baan.
translations.hi: वह अपनी नौकरी को लेकर चिंतित है.
translations.nb: Han er bekymret for jobben sin.
translations.sv: Han är orolig för sitt jobb.
translations.ro: El este îngrijorat pentru locul lui de muncă.
translations.da: Han er bekymret for sit job.
translations.ja: 彼は仕事のことを心配している。

tokens.explanation: Personal pronoun (3SG.MASC.NOM); subject.
Finite main verb (3SG.PRS); lexical 'haben' taking a direct object 'Sorge' and a PP complement with 'um'.
Noun (FEM.SG.ACC); direct object in the fixed expression 'Sorge haben (um + ACC)'.
Preposition governing Accusative; introduces the object of concern.
Possessive determiner (ACC.SG.MASC) agreeing with 'Job'; inside the PP headed by 'um'.
Noun (MASC.SG.ACC); object of the preposition 'um' (target of the concern).

sentences.target: Meine Sorge ist die Gesundheit meiner Mutter.
sentences.reading: /ˈmaɪ̯nə ˈzɔʁɡə ɪst diː ɡəˈzʊntʰaɪ̯t ˈmaɪ̯nɐ ˈmʊtɐ/

translations.de: Meine Sorge ist die Gesundheit meiner Mutter.
translations.ipa: /ˈmaɪ̯nə ˈzɔʁɡə ɪst diː ɡəˈzʊntʰaɪ̯t ˈmaɪ̯nɐ ˈmʊtɐ/
translations.en: My worry is my mother's health.
translations.es: Me preocupa la salud de mi madre.
translations.fr: La santé de ma mère me préoccupe.
translations.it: Mi preoccupa la salute di mia madre.
translations.pt: A saúde da minha mãe me preocupa.
translations.vi: Tôi lo cho sức khỏe của mẹ tôi.
translations.nl: Ik maak me zorgen om de gezondheid van mijn moeder.
translations.uk: Я хвилююся за здоров'я моєї мами.
translations.hi: मुझे अपनी माँ की सेहत की चिंता है.
translations.pl: Martwię się o zdrowie mojej mamy.
translations.el: Με ανησυχεί η υγεία της μητέρας μου.
translations.nb: Jeg bekymrer meg for helsen til moren min.
translations.id: Saya khawatir dengan kesehatan ibu saya.
translations.sv: Jag oroar mig för min mammas hälsa.
translations.cs: Mám obavy o zdraví své matky.
translations.da: Jeg bekymrer mig for min mors helbred.

tokens.explanation: Possessive determiner (NOM.SG.FEM) modifying the subject noun 'Sorge'.
Noun (FEM.SG.NOM); head of the subject NP.
Copular auxiliary (3SG.PRS) linking subject and predicate nominal.
Definite article (NOM.SG.FEM) for the predicate noun 'Gesundheit'.
Noun (FEM.SG.NOM); predicate nominal (predicative complement).
Possessive determiner (GEN.SG.FEM) modifying 'Mutter' within the NP.
Noun (FEM.SG.GEN); genitive attribute specifying whose health.
